data.title: Plato Gold Appoints Andrew Leslie as Advisor
data.description:
Plato Gold (TSE:PGC) has released an update.

Plato Gold Corp. has appointed the Honourable Andrew Leslie as an advisor, leveraging his extensive experience in military, business, and government to advance their critical mineral projects. Leslie’s impressive background, including roles in the Canadian Army and as a corporate executive, positions him as a valuable asset to Plato’s seasoned management team.

data.title: China Tianrui Group Cement Appoints New Joint Company Secretary
data.description:
China Tianrui Group Cement Co., Ltd. (HK:1252) has released an update.

China Tianrui Group Cement Company Limited has announced a leadership change with the resignation of Mr. Chen Kun as Joint Company Secretary and Authorised Representative, effective October 16, 2024. Ms. Lui Mei Ka, a seasoned professional with over 17 years of experience in financial management and corporate finance, has been appointed to fill these roles. The company expressed gratitude to Mr. Chen for his contributions and warmly welcomed Ms. Lui to her new position.

For further insights into HK:1252 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Galliford Try Director Sells Shares Amid Market Activity
data.description:
Galliford Try (GB:GFRD) has released an update.

Galliford Try Holdings’ Managing Director, David Lowery, has sold 1,499 ordinary shares at £3.338999 each on the London Stock Exchange, totaling £5,005.16. This transaction highlights the trading activities of key personnel within the UK construction group, which is well-regarded for its infrastructure projects across various sectors.

data.title: JSS Real Estate SOCIMI’s Acquisition Bid for Árima Approved
data.description:
Arima Real Estate SOCIMI SA (ES:ARM) has released an update.

The National Securities Market Commission has authorized JSS Real Estate SOCIMI’s offer to acquire 100% of Árima Real Estate SOCIMI’s shares at 8.61 euros per share, in a move involving 25,982,941 shares across major Spanish stock exchanges. Although the offer price is set freely by the offeror, it is not considered a fair price under current regulations.

For further insights into ES:ARM stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Costain Group Offers Scrip Dividend Alternative
data.description:
Costain (GB:COST) has released an update.

Costain Group PLC has announced that shareholders have opted to receive 19,008 new ordinary shares instead of cash for their interim dividends for 2024. This move comes after the renewal of the scrip dividend scheme approved in 2022. The new shares will commence trading on the London Stock Exchange on October 18, 2024, alongside the company’s existing shares.

For further insights into GB:COST stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cullinan Management Advances SLE Treatment with FDA Trial
data.description:
Cullinan Management ( (CGEM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cullinan Therapeutics has received FDA clearance to proceed with a Phase 1 clinical trial of CLN-978, a novel bispecific T cell engager, for treating systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). This trial aims to evaluate the safety and efficacy of CLN-978 in patients with moderate to severe SLE, offering a potentially groundbreaking approach to addressing unmet medical needs in autoimmune diseases. The study will explore various dosing phases to assess the optimal treatment strategy, highlighting Cullinan’s commitment to advancing therapeutic solutions in autoimmune conditions.

See more insights into CGEM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Silverlake Axis Shares Targeted in UOB’s Strategic Acquisition
data.description:
Silverlake Axis (SG:5CP) has released an update.

United Overseas Bank Limited, on behalf of E2I Ltd., has made a voluntary unconditional offer to acquire all ordinary shares of Silverlake Axis Ltd., excluding those already held or agreed to be acquired by the Offeror. The offer consideration is final, with the closing date extended to October 21, 2024. This move is seen as part of a strategic bid to consolidate shares and strengthen market presence.

For further insights into SG:5CP stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Shandong Weigao Announces Interim Dividend for 2024
data.description:
Shandong Weigao Group Medical Polymer Co (HK:1066) has released an update.

Shandong Weigao Group Medical Polymer Company Limited has announced an interim dividend of RMB 0.0919 per share for the first half of 2024, payable in Hong Kong dollars at HKD 0.1009 per share. The ex-dividend date is set for October 18, 2024, with payment scheduled for November 22, 2024. The company will apply withholding taxes on dividends for both non-resident enterprise and individual shareholders.

For further insights into HK:1066 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cellnex Telecom to Announce Q3 2024 Results
data.description:
Cellnex Telecom SA (ES:CLNX) has released an update.

Cellnex Telecom SA is set to release its Q3 2024 financial results on November 11, 2024, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call for analysts and institutional investors to discuss these results later that day. Interested parties can follow the call via audio streaming by registering online.

data.title: US Bancorp Reports Strong Q3 and Strategic Moves
data.description:
An update from US Bancorp ( (USB) ) is now available.

U.S. Bancorp reported a strong third quarter with a net income of $1,714 million, reflecting a robust return on tangible common equity of 17.9%. The company saw a rise in net interest income driven by favorable loan mixes and disciplined liability management, while noninterest income increased across various sectors such as commercial products and mortgage banking. As U.S. Bancorp strengthens its capital position, it plans to resume share buybacks soon and has formed strategic partnerships to expand financial services, including a collaboration with Edward Jones and the acquisition of healthcare payment platform Salucro.

For an in-depth examination of USB stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
